title: nco_enrichment_result_v1 — Fisher exact on target_class × inside-inv
description: Typed result of the `nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion` chain. Single result block (cohort-level) — per-candidate fan-out is a v2. Produced by `compute_nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion`; provenance carries the source tract_classifications_v1 layer_id + target_class parameter. Backs meiosis_atlas chain product nco_enrichment_result.

n_inside_target.description: Cell a: target_class tracts with inside_inversion=='yes'.

n_outside_target.description: Cell b: target_class tracts with inside_inversion=='no'.

n_inside_other_nco_like.description: Cell c: other-NCO-like (NCO if target=MOSAIC_SHORT, else MOSAIC_SHORT) tracts with inside_inversion=='yes'.

n_outside_other_nco_like.description: Cell d: other-NCO-like tracts with inside_inversion=='no'.

odds_ratio.description: (a·d)/(b·c). null when any of b,c == 0 and a·d == 0; +Inf is rendered as null in JSON.

log_odds.description: Haldane-corrected log odds for diagnostic display.

p_fisher_two_sided.description: Two-sided exact p; null when any marginal is 0.

p_fisher_one_sided_greater.description: One-sided exact p (tests enrichment specifically). The manuscript-grade headline number.

n_excluded_tracts.description: Tracts dropped from the test (CO/DCO/AMBIG/LOW_CONFIDENCE, or inside_inversion ∉ {yes,no}).

n_inside_inversion.description: NCO-like tracts with inside_inversion=='yes' (used cell totals a+c).

n_outside_inversion.description: NCO-like tracts with inside_inversion=='no'  (used cell totals b+d).

n_target_class_overall.description: Target-class total used in the test (a+b).
